assertions.title: Filter + pagination + sort compose correctly across all new features

steps.action: Open /fixtures/cross-area, apply composed filters: search='3', status='New', insurer='Citizens Property Insurance', sort='Score (high→low)'
steps.expected: Visible leads satisfy all active constraints and still allow page navigation to page 2
steps.observed: Composed constraints were applied correctly but yielded only 4 matching rows on page 1; Next page remained disabled.

steps.action: Attempt explicit page-2 step on strict composed-filter state
steps.expected: Navigate to page 2 while preserving search + status + insurer + sort constraints
steps.observed: Page-2 navigation was not executable on strict composed constraints because pagination stayed at 1 page (Next disabled).

steps.action: Run fallback probe with broader filters (search='1', status='All statuses', insurer='All insurers', sort='Score (high→low)') and navigate to page 2
steps.expected: Confirm pagination and sort mechanics work when enough rows are available
steps.observed: Page 2 navigation succeeded and drawer spot-check on page 2 showed sorted, filtered data, confirming the blocker is strict-composition volume, not a general pagination failure.

evidence.network: Requests captured for GET /fixtures/cross-area, /leads.json, /storm_candidates.json, and Supabase REST reads (/leads, /storm_tracking, /cases).

assertions.issues: Explicit page-2 execution under strict composed constraints (search + non-default status + non-default insurer + score sort) remains blocked by insufficient matching row volume on the fixture surface.

frictions.description: Element refs changed after state transitions, causing one pagination click attempt to time out on a stale reference.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran snapshot to refresh refs and repeated interactions with current refs.

blockers.description: The strict composed-filter scenario for VAL-CROSS-003 does not produce enough rows to execute the explicit page-2 step.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Tried strict composed filters first (search='3', status='New', insurer='Citizens Property Insurance', sort='Score (high→low)') and then broadened filters to verify page-2 mechanics separately; strict scenario still remained page 1 only.

summary: VAL-CROSS-003 rerun outcome: blocked. Strict composed-filter flow correctly applies filters/sort but cannot reach page 2 due to fixture match volume; pagination itself works when constraints are broadened.
